headlines.headline: Crevex Labs reports record quarterly revenue, up 7% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Reporting record quarterly revenue with a 7% year-over-year increase is a clear positive financial indicator for the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
